title: Big Eva ebay auction
wikitext:
[]: Big Eva ebay auction             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Jan 08, 2007 2:49 pm I just got a mail from thekillingmantra. If you don't know him, he was the guy who took the screencaps from the renewal scripts, scanned the theatrical programs, Data of Eva and Eva tomo no Kai. He also had a huge doujin collection. Well, he told me he's selling most of his eva merchandise here: http://cgi.ebay.com.au/ws/eBayISAPI.dll?ViewItem&item=120071831234 Lots of rare stuff you might want to check out. If I had any money, I'd be buying this without saying a word. But my financial situation is creepy considering my age. So I'll have to pass. But don't miss it! Note: ebay Australia.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Mon Jan 08, 2007 4:40 pm Not that bad of a price for how rare some of that stuff is but alas I too shall pass. I could afford it but truthfully I don't really want any of that stuff. I will let a real Eva fan have a crack at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Mon Jan 08, 2007 5:38 pm Hmm, what's the AU/US dollar rate? Might be helpful to any people in the US who'd like to buy it. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 08, 2007 6:36 pm Got most of it, fufufu.

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Jan 08, 2007 6:37 pm http://www.x-rates.com/d/AUD/table.html

[]:             Quote Post by KingSpider » Mon Jan 08, 2007 8:00 pm I would totally buy it if I had the money

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Tue Jan 09, 2007 1:24 am unfortunately due to college tuition and the criminal pricing on college textbooks, I am near broke. :(

[]:             Quote Post by brainDamage » Tue Jan 09, 2007 1:41 am Tokpile Quohog wrote: unfortunately due to college tuition and the criminal pricing on college textbooks, I am near broke. :(

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 09, 2007 2:16 am Tempting.... Half the stuff I want. The other half I already have. Such a shame to make one person buy all of it. Not to mention that half the fun of collecting is the act of searching. It's no fun to just be given all the rare stuff all at once. Still, all things considered, this is a great deal for an aspiring Eva fan with money to blow.

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Tue Jan 09, 2007 3:36 am I'd probably pick it up if I had the money but meh... The instant I get a more steady income, I'll work hard to catch up to that... Gimme a couple years, I'll either have most of that, or try to match that in sheer volume. Sucks too... I'm a collector.

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:42 am MONEY! I NEED MONEYYYY!!!!!!! Hell, I'd kill for something like that! Ok ok... I'm lying. But still, if only....

[]:             Quote Post by Ejinathan » Tue Jan 09, 2007 6:54 am you have to be grazy ..... to sell that. I only have 3 artbooks of all artbooks he has. This guy won't survive the choque after he sold it. mes condoleances your son just died...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jan 09, 2007 1:50 pm Such a waste, I would be willing to pay good money for some of the items individually. Even if someone were willing to pay the 450 bucks AU, he could make more than that if he sold the stuff individually. I know those Paul Champagne boxes sell for at least 100 bucks US, and that's just an aluminum box. I'm sure people would pay good money for that copy of 2015 or the End of Eva program book. He's going to make one rich person happy, when he could make a bunch of collectors happy.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:04 pm I wouldn't go so far as saying only a rich person is going to be able to buy it but I agree with your point on him breaking up the set. It gives more people a chance at owning something rare that they currently don't have. Figuring the conversion rate and S&H you could probably get the collection for under $400 (US) then turn around and sell the stuff individually for maybe over $600 (US). Not a bad entrepreneurial opportunity actually if someone was interested in making some money.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:17 pm I wish i had money to buy them! But why is he selling them? I know i wouldn't! Some stuff are pretty rare there!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:20 pm the_seventh_child wrote: But why is he selling them?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:25 pm Yeah but he owns a lot of stuff, meaning that he was really obsessed with Eva. I don't know how he could ever get "bored" of them. Even if i was not that interested in Eva anymore, I would keep them to my collection! That's me of course. Anyway, i guess a lot of guys will want to buy these stuff. So 450 CD huh? That means 320 euros! Well they are not that cheap!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:38 pm the_seventh_child wrote: Yeah but he owns a lot of stuff, meaning that he was really obsessed with Eva. I don't know how he could ever get "bored" of them.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Tue Jan 09, 2007 5:56 pm The only thing in there that seems attractive to me is 2015 . The storyboard books might hold my interest for a few minutes, but mostly it seems like a lot of space-eaters.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 09, 2007 6:09 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: The only thing in there that seems attractive to me is 2015 . The storyboard books might hold my interest for a few minutes, but mostly it seems like a lot of space-eaters.
